overall.description: Gameplay footage from a sci-fi thriller game showing a character in a futuristic spacesuit exploring a medical bay facility. The character transitions from calm exploration under teal medical lighting to frantic running through red-lit emergency corridors after an alarm triggers, eventually reaching a storage room with an exterior view.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical bay with surgical equipment and privacy curtains

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the medical bay, observing the surroundings and equipment

entered.detail: overhead surgical lighting rig with multiple adjustable lamps
various medical devices and monitors on stands and counters
hanging fabric curtains providing privacy between medical stations
digital directory sign displaying FORT SOLIS and patient information

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sterile medical bay illuminated by teal-tinted artificial lighting. Surgical lights hang from the ceiling while medical equipment and privacy curtains define the space. The environment is empty and quiet as the character explores the facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical examination area with sink and mirrors

events.description: character picks up and examines a blood-stained medical tool from a sink
character turns away from sink and walks toward the airlock exit

agents.ego_description: examining objects including a data directory and a blood-stained tool, then moving toward the exit

entered.detail: white ceramic sink with faucets and blood stains
bloody medical instrument picked up and examined by character
mirror above the sink reflecting the room
heavy metal door with access panel leading to corridor

segments.scene_description: The character interacts with objects in a medical examination area, examining a bloody tool at a sink. After inspection, the character turns and walks toward an airlock door, passing various medical equipment and teal curtains.

scene_state.functional_zone: airlock transition chamber with emergency lighting

events.description: alarm triggers and lighting shifts dramatically from teal to red emergency mode
character enters airlock chamber with yellow lighting before alarm triggers

agents.ego_description: walking through airlock door then breaking into a run as red alarm lights activate

entered.detail: digital panel with buttons and card reader next to door
flashing red alarm lights illuminating the corridor
glowing red LED strips along the floor edges

segments.scene_description: The character enters an airlock transition area where the lighting shifts from yellow to intense red as an alarm triggers. The environment becomes tense with flashing emergency lights and fog effects as the character begins to run through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: emergency corridor with locked bulkhead doors

events.description: character transitions from walking to full sprint through red-lit corridor
character attempts to open a locked door panel but finds it sealed

agents.ego_description: running frantically through emergency corridors and attempting to open a locked bulkhead door

entered.detail: metal door with LOCKED display and warning symbols
warning sign with arrows and text on the wall
metal wall plating with industrial rivets and panels

segments.scene_description: The character sprints through narrow red-lit emergency corridors, attempting to escape. The character reaches a locked bulkhead door and tries unsuccessfully to open it before turning back to find another route.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room with exterior view window

events.description: character enters storage room with large window showing exterior landscape

agents.ego_description: running through final corridor and entering a storage room with barrels and equipment

entered.detail: stacked yellow and red industrial barrels and containers
large window showing rocky exterior landscape and daylight
industrial metal racks with stored supplies

segments.scene_description: The character continues running through the emergency corridor and enters a storage room containing stacked barrels, metal shelving, and a large window revealing the exterior rocky landscape. The red emergency lighting persists but mixes with natural light from the window.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile medical bay that shifts from general exploration to a focused investigation of a crime scene. It begins with the character walking through a quiet facility illuminated by teal-tinted artificial lighting, passing under hanging surgical lights and between privacy curtains. As the character moves deeper into the bay, the scene narrows toward a medical examination area where the camera lingers on a bloody tool resting at a sink. The perspective then shifts as the character turns away from the evidence, navigating past various pieces of medical equipment and teal curtains before finally approaching an airlock door.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a facility that transforms from a sterile transition zone into a frantic, red-lit emergency escape. It begins as the character enters an airlock where the yellow lighting abruptly shifts to intense, flashing red as an alarm triggers and fog fills the air. As the character begins to sprint, the scene moves through narrow emergency corridors before reaching a locked bulkhead door that forces a sudden turn back to find another route. The camera then follows the character as they push forward through the corridor and enter a storage room filled with stacked barrels and metal shelving. Finally, the oppressive red emergency lighting mixes with natural light streaming through a large window that reveals a desolate, rocky exterior landscape.
